deals.deal: Alice Waters Peach & Goat Cheese Salad

deals.deal: Free 24oz Smoothie with $20+ Order — Sweet Treat Week

Score 20 boneless wings, a large fry, and two dips for $16.99 — Wingstop's revived fan-favorite bundle back for FIFA World Cup season.
Daily in-app deal — McDouble or McChicken, small fries, 4-piece McNuggets, and a small drink for $5 at participating locations nationwide.
Build your own $5 combo with a Whopper Jr., Bacon Cheeseburger, or Chicken Jr. plus fries, nuggets, and a drink — available all summer.
Choose three pieces of chicken, two sides, or a sandwich from Popeyes' value-focused Faves Menu — no code needed, available in-store and in-app.

deals.desc: Order any pizza at any size for $9.99, now including Parmesan Stuffed Crust at no extra charge, via the Domino's app or online.
Grab five crispy chicken tenders for just $5 when you order through the KFC app on a weekday.
